auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage the Cena learning platform
auth.registerSubtitle: Make your app management easy and fun!
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftNotice: Draft awaiting Cena legal counsel review
privacy.introBody: Cena ("we", "us", "our") operates the Cena adaptive learning platform (the "Service"). This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, how we use it, and what rights you have regarding your data. This policy applies to all users of the Service, including students, parents, guardians, teachers, and administrators.
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We collect the minimum data necessary to provide and improve the Service:
privacy.dataEmail: Email address — used for account creation, authentication, and account recovery.
privacy.dataName: Display name — chosen by the user, shown to classmates and teachers.
privacy.dataDob: Date of birth — used for age verification and consent tier classification. Never displayed to other users.
privacy.dataLearning: Learning activity data — session duration, questions answered, accuracy, mastery levels, and progress metrics.
privacy.dataTutor: AI tutor conversations — messages exchanged with the AI tutor, used to provide personalized educational guidance.
privacy.dataDevice: Device and usage data — browser type, operating system, IP address (anonymized), and interaction patterns for service reliability.
privacy.purposeAdaptive: Adaptive learning — to personalize question difficulty, pacing, and content to each learner's level.
privacy.purposeAuth: Authentication — to verify your identity and protect your account.
privacy.purposeProgress: Progress tracking — to show you, your teachers, and (for minors) your parents how your learning is progressing.
privacy.purposeSafety: Safety and compliance — to enforce age-appropriate content policies and comply with applicable laws.
privacy.purposeImprove: Service improvement — to analyze aggregated, anonymized usage patterns to improve the platform.
privacy.basisConsent: Consent (GDPR Art 6(1)(a)) — for users aged 16 and above who create an account.
privacy.basisParental: Parental consent (GDPR Art 8, COPPA) — for users under 16. We collect verifiable parental consent before processing any child's personal data.
privacy.basisContract: Contract performance (GDPR Art 6(1)(b)) — processing necessary to provide the Service you registered for.
privacy.basisLegitimate: Legitimate interest (GDPR Art 6(1)(f)) — for anonymized analytics and platform security.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain personal data only as long as necessary. Account data is deleted within 30 days of a deletion request. AI tutor conversations are purged after 12 months. Date of birth is retained in the consent audit trail for the account lifetime plus 3 years. IP addresses are anonymized within 90 days.
privacy.processorsIntro: We share personal data with the following processors, each bound by data processing agreements:
privacy.processorAnthropic: Anthropic (San Francisco, USA) — AI tutor service. Processes conversation messages to generate educational responses. Conversations are not used to train Anthropic's models.
privacy.processorFirebase: Google Firebase (Google Cloud) — authentication services, database hosting, and analytics.
privacy.transfersBody: Your data may be transferred to countries outside your jurisdiction, including the United States. We ensure adequate protection through Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs), adequacy decisions, and supplementary measures. For Israeli users: transfers comply with the Israel Protection of Privacy Regulations.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under GDPR, Israel PPL, and applicable law, you have the right to:
privacy.rightAccess: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rightRectify: Rectification — request correction of inaccurate personal data.
privacy.rightErase: Erasure — request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal retention obligations.
privacy.rightPortability: Data portability — receive your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.rightWithdraw: Withdraw consent — withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.rightObject: Object — object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.rightComplain: Lodge a complaint — file a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy.dsarBody: To exercise any of your rights, email privacy@cena.edu with the subject line "DSAR". We will verify your identity and respond within 30 calendar days.
privacy.parentRightsIntro: Parents and guardians of minor users have additional rights under COPPA and GDPR:
privacy.parentReview: Review — request a copy of all personal data collected from your child.
privacy.parentDelete: Delete — request deletion of your child's personal data and account.
privacy.parentRevoke: Revoke consent — withdraw consent for further data collection, which will result in account deactivation.

children.title: Children's Privacy Notice
children.draftNotice: Draft awaiting Cena legal counsel review
children.whatIsThisBody: This page tells you how Cena uses your info. Cena is a learning app. We keep your info safe. Your parent or guardian said it was OK for you to use Cena.
children.whatWeCollectIntro: When you use Cena, we keep a small amount of info about you:
children.collectName: Your name — the name you pick when you sign up.
children.collectEmail: Your email — so you can log in.
children.collectAge: Your age — so we know the right rules to follow.
children.collectAnswers: Your answers — the work you do in learning sessions.
children.collectChat: Your chats — what you say to the AI tutor.
children.whyWeCollectBody: We use your info to help you learn. Cena picks questions that are right for you. It tracks how well you are doing so you and your teacher can see your progress. We do NOT sell your info. We do NOT share it with other kids. We do NOT use it to show you ads.
children.noAdsBody: Cena does not show you any ads. We do not track what you do outside of Cena. We do not let other companies track you inside Cena.
children.parentPermissionBody: Before you could use Cena, your parent or guardian gave us permission. They told us it was OK to keep your info. If your parent changes their mind, they can ask us to delete all of your info.
children.parentActionSee: See your info — ask us to show them what we have.
children.parentActionDelete: Delete your info — ask us to erase everything about you.
children.parentActionStop: Stop us from keeping your info — which means your account will close.
children.safetyTitle: 7. How we keep your info safe
children.safetyBody: We lock your info with strong security, like a safe. Only the people who need to see it can see it. We check our security often to make sure it stays strong.
children.retentionTitle: 8. How long we keep your info
children.retentionBody: We keep your info while you have an account. If your parent asks us to delete it, we do so within 30 days. Your answers and chats are kept for up to 12 months, then we erase them.
children.contactBody: If you or your parent have any questions, email us at privacy@cena.edu. We will write back within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.draftNotice: Draft awaiting Cena legal counsel review
terms.acceptanceBody: By creating an account or using the Cena platform ("Service"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service. For users under 16, a parent or guardian must accept these terms on the user's behalf.
terms.serviceBody: Cena is an adaptive learning platform that provides personalized educational experiences through AI-powered tutoring, practice sessions, progress tracking, and social learning features.
terms.eligibilityBody: Users must be at least 4 years old to use Cena. Users under 16 require verifiable parental or guardian consent before account creation. Parents and guardians are responsible for their minor's use of the Service.
terms.accountsBody: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate information during registration and to update it if it changes. You must notify us immediately if you believe your account has been compromised.
terms.useNoHarm: Use the Service to harm, bully, or harass other users.
terms.useNoReverse: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the Service.
terms.useNoScrape: Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or collect data from the Service.
terms.useNoImpersonate: Impersonate another person or misrepresent your identity or age.
terms.useNoAbuse: Attempt to circumvent the age gate, parental consent mechanisms, or other safety features.
terms.ipBody: All content, software, designs, and trademarks on the Service are owned by Cena or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute any part of the Service without written permission.
terms.aiBody: The AI tutor is powered by third-party language model technology. Tutor responses are generated by artificial intelligence and may contain errors. The tutor is a supplementary learning tool and does not replace human teachers or official curricula.
terms.disclaimerBody: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available." We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, error-free operation, or that the Service will meet all educational needs.
terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Cena shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.terminationBody: You may delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or if required by law. Data deletion follows the timelines described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.governingLawBody: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Israel. Disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel, unless applicable consumer protection law provides otherwise.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms: legal@cena.edu. For privacy inquiries: privacy@cena.edu.

footer.agreementNotice: By registering, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
